source.prompt:
Project title: Nuno.
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 1 of 1: Strange Events at Lola's House.
Section purpose: Set the eerie mood and introduce Carlo's unsettling experience..
Beat 1 of 8 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: At 11:46 PM, during a brownout in my Lola’s house, my cousin Carlo sat straight up in bed and whispered:
Next beat narration: 'Ma… may tao sa ilalim.' Mom… there’s someone underneath.

Visual target:
Dark bedroom, silhouette of a boy sitting up in bed, faint candlelight revealing shadows.

Shot type: medium shot
Camera distance: medium
Lighting: candlelight glow
Lens: normal
Composition: subject centered
Subject continuity: consistent

Style preset: animatic
Look and feel: mysterious and dark
Character anchors: Carlo: young boy, 10-12 years old, wearing casual sleep wear; Lola: elderly woman, traditional attire; Mother: mid-30s, modern clothing; Cousins: children, varying ages
Continuity rules: Carlo remains the same age and appearance throughout; All characters maintain consistency in clothing style

Visual direction:
Project feel: eerie animated suspense with emotional intensity
Project pacing: measured slow-burn with sharp turns
Project visual style: stylized animated cinematic frames, explicitly non-photorealistic and non-ghibli style but still soft and fantastical
Section feel: eerie, suspenseful
Section pacing: steady build-up
Section visual style: dark, atmospheric
Style preset: animatic
Look and feel: mysterious and dark
Palette: #0A0A0A; #3C3C3C; #545454; #A3A3A3; #1C1C1C
Era and location: modern-day rural setting
Character anchors: Carlo: young boy, 10-12 years old, wearing casual sleep wear; Lola: elderly woman, traditional attire; Mother: mid-30s, modern clothing; Cousins: children, varying ages
Continuity rules: Carlo remains the same age and appearance throughout; All characters maintain consistency in clothing style

Create a vertical 9:16 image for the current beat.
Follow the visual direction exactly; do not add a visual medium, rendering style, camera format, or realism level that conflicts with it.
Depict the exact current beat, not a generic mood board and not a later event.
Preserve continuity with the immediately previous and next beats, but do not introduce objects, characters, or reveals that have not happened yet.
Keep anatomy, geometry, lighting, and composition coherent for a vertical frame.
Avoid fake text, UI, subtitles, watermarks, logos, split screens, soundwave graphics, continuity errors, distorted hands or faces, and unintended extra objects or characters.

Project title: Nuno.
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 1 of 1: Strange Events at Lola's House.
Section purpose: Set the eerie mood and introduce Carlo's unsettling experience..
Beat 6 of 8 in this section.
Previous beat narration: There was nothing there. Just dust. One missing slipper. And a trail of wet soil leading from Carlo’s bed… to the wall.
Current beat narration: The strange part was, nobody had gone outside.
Next beat narration: But at the bottom of the wall, right beside Carlo's bed, someone had written three tiny words in mud: 'Hindi siya nagpaalam.' He didn’t ask permission.

Visual target:
Visual of the locked windows and doors, heavy rain outside.
